taxonomy: Caroxylon adiscum is a species of plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is a succulent plant native to the island of Madagascar. The classification of Caroxylon adiscum places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. At the order and family levels, it is classified as Caryophyllales and Amaranthaceae, respectively. This classification allows for a better understanding of the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics.
